channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court Clarifies: Voter List Exclusion Doesn't Automatically Result in Citizenship Loss
item.description: The Supreme Court recently emphasized that being excluded from the voter list during the special intensive revision of electoral rolls in West Bengal does not automatically lead to the loss of citizen...

item.title: ODM Leader Calls for Peace After DCP's By-Election Victory, Defends IEBC
item.description: ODM leader Oburu Oginga has criticized former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua's confrontational approach, urging him to promote peace after DCP's victory in the Ol Kalou by-election. Oginga praised ...

item.title: Tanzania boosts rural water access to 85%
item.description: The article highlights progress in expanding clean water access across Tanzania's rural areas, with coverage now reaching 85% of the population. This development comes amid ongoing challenges in infra...

item.title: Distillery Owner Faces Charges Over 2024 Methanol Poisonings That Killed Australians
item.description: A Laotian distillery owner faces charges over the November 2024 methanol poisoning incident that killed six foreign nationals, including two Australian teenagers. Danish officials claim the defendant ...

item.title: Enugu Cooking Gas Price Drops: Residents Welcome Relief
item.description: The price of Liquefied Petroleum Gas (LPG), commonly known as cooking gas, has significantly dropped in Enugu, according to a market survey. Owners of refilling depots reported that prices fell from N...

item.title: Wildfire Smoke Expected to Linger and Spread This Weekend, Affecting Major Cities
item.description: Wildfire smoke from Canada continued to impact the United States on July 17, 2026, with Detroit, Chicago, and Washington, D.C. ranking among the world's most polluted major cities. Air quality measure...

item.title: Republican Lawmaker Criticized for Misrepresenting Canada's Wildfire Response
item.description: Rep. Lisa McClain (R-MI), a House Republican Conference Chair, sparked backlash after criticizing Canada's wildfire response on social media. In a post on X, she claimed Michiganders were suffering fr...

item.title: Tanzania criticizes CRBC for delays in DMDP II project completion
item.description: Tanzania has expressed concerns to the Central Bank of Tanzania (CRBC) regarding the prolonged delays in completing the DMDP II project, which is critical for the country's development. The project, a...

item.title: North African Football Teams' World Cup Performances Highlight Institutional Challenges and Success Factors
item.description: The article analyzes the contrasting performances of North African football teams in the recent World Cup, focusing on institutional factors rather than individual talent. Morocco's hybrid model combi...

item.title: Trump's Claims of Election Fraud and Government Conflict in 2020
item.description: The article examines former U.S. President Donald Trump's persistent claims of election fraud following the 2020 presidential election, which he lost to Joe Biden. It highlights how Trump's rhetoric f...

item.title: Alex Eala Confirmed as DC Open Player for 2026 Tournament
item.description: Alex Eala, the Philippine tennis sensation, has been officially added to the prestigious DC Open player list for the 2026 tournament. This marks a significant milestone in her career as she joins a li...

item.title: Nova Scotia Wildfire Grows to 1,700 Hectares, Evacuations in Place
item.description: A wildfire near Mooseland Road on Nova Scotia’s Eastern Shore has expanded to 1,700 hectares, up from an earlier estimate of 300 hectares. Mandatory evacuations remain in effect for a 22-kilometre str...

item.title: PCSO Lotto Draw on July 17, 2026: No Winners for Major Jackpots
item.description: The Philippine Charity Sweepstakes Office (PCSO) announced that there were no winners for either of the major lotto jackpots offered on Friday, July 17, 2026. The Ultra Lotto 6/58 jackpot, which had a...

item.title: Andy Burnham elected as UK prime minister amid leadership transition and policy challenges
item.description: Andy Burnham has been officially declared leader of the UK Labour Party, clearing the final hurdle to become prime minister. The former mayor of Greater Manchester secured 379 nominations from Labour ...

item.title: Wildfire Smoke from Ontario Causes Air Quality Concerns in Winnipeg
item.description: Environment and Climate Change Canada (ECCC) has issued an air quality warning for Winnipeg as southeasterly winds carry smoke from wildfires burning in northwestern Ontario. The yellow-level alert wa...

item.title: Blackwater secures second win against Magnolia in PBA game
item.description: The Philippine Basketball Association (PBA) game between Blackwater and Magnolia concluded with Blackwater emerging victorious, marking their second win in the season. The match, held on July 18, 2026...

item.title: UK Drops Foreign Power Allegations in Adil Raja and Shahzad Akbar Attack Case
item.description: The UK Prosecution Service has withdrawn allegations linking the National Security Act and foreign power provisions to the case of former accountability adviser Mirza Shahzad Akbar and YouTuber Adil R...

item.title: Zimbabwean Woman Dies at Beitbridge Border; South Africa Clarifies Not Part of Repatriation
item.description: A Zimbabwean woman who collapsed and died at the Beitbridge Border Post in Limpopo, South Africa, was not part of the official repatriation process, according to the Home Affairs Department. Chief Dir...

item.title: Claudia Winkleman leaves BBC chat show after one season
item.description: The article compiles a series of celebrity news snippets, including Claudia Winkleman’s exit from her BBC chat show, Sharon Gaffka welcoming her first child, and other entertainment-related updates. H...

item.title: Website access issue: News Corp Australia blocks crawler bot activity
item.description: The article discusses an error message encountered by users attempting to access News Corp Australia websites, indicating they may have been detected as crawler bots. News Corp Australia employs softw...
